title: Bombay High Court slams MSRTC for relying on press reports to terminate a bus driver
description: The Aurangabad Bench of the Bombay High Court recently took strong exception to the Maharashtra State Road Transport Corporation (MSRTC) dismissing a bus driver from service based solely on media coverage of a 2019 accident [MSRTC v. Anil Nikam].In an order passed on March 25, Justice Ajit B Kadethankar held that television and newspaper reports cannot substitute a proper departmental inquiry.The Court was hearing a plea by MSRTC’s Jalgaon division against orders of the Labour Court and Industri
